intro.label: Intro
intro.name: Shamim Bin Zahid
intro.quote: Making the world slightly better with better designed "Things"

about.label: About Me
about.value: Software Product Designer, Researcher, and UI/UX Lead with 5+ years of experience delivering accessible, intuitive, scalable, and human-centered B2B/B2C systems, specializing in end-to-end product design of both traditional and AI-powered software, translating them into clear, trustworthy user experiences, across a wide range of industries, including HR-tech, telco, health-tech, e-commerce, marketplace, and edtech.

resume.label: View CV
resume.subtitle: Usually updated every month, Reach out if out of date.

contact.label: Contact
contact.subtitle: Feel free to reach out using the form or thru email

responsibilities: Collaborate to define and prioritize the product roadmap based on business and user needs.
Conduct user research to identify pain points and preferences, Analyze user feedback to inform product decisions.
Create user-friendly designs that align with product goals.
Work with developers to ensure smooth design implementation and conduct QA processes to ensure product quality.
contributions: Migrated the company website to Framer, with 17+ pages, 8+ dynamic code components in under 2 months.

Redesigned the entire web app end-to-end, across both recruiter and talent journeys, improving metrics— reducing incomplete profiles, unfinished evaluations, and user errors, while improving the overall vetting process.
Drive design strategy through ongoing user research, translating findings directly into product decisions.
Partner with developers through handoff and QA to close the gap between design intent and shipped products.

responsibilities: Led, managed & trained the UI/UX design team, taking ownership of the design process from concept to execution.
Performed requirement analysis, prepared software design specifications and ensured alignment between client needs and technical implementations in an agile scrum environment.
Developed information architecture and partnered with backend teams to create system designs and database models.
Handled the majority of design decisions, designing UIs, including wireframes, prototypes, and design systems for brands.
Worked closely with the frontend team, including creating design guides, design reviews, and code reviews.
Conducted usability testing and manual QA testing, providing detailed reports for continuous improvement.
Conducted client demonstrations and played an instrumental role in recruiting for the UI/UX and Frontend development teams.
Managed and oversaw the design process of B2B and B2C systems across industries, including pharmaceuticals, healthcare, e-commerce, and recruitment management.
contributions: Owned the full product lifecycle across 6 products with a team of 2–4 designers and 15–25 developers, from research, system design, prototyping, UI design, UX evaluation, through delivery, QA, and launch.
Pushed sprint say-do ratio from ~50% to ~90% through structured sprint planning.
Cut bug reports per sprint by up to 80% via tighter QA processes, dev handoff standards, and CI/CD coordination.
Built and ran a formal mentorship program covering hiring, curriculum, evaluation for 5+ UX and 30+ frontend trainees.

responsibilities: Led the UI/UX design of the projects, managing end-to-end product design processes across multiple products.
Took a hands-on approach in designing responsive UIs and prototypes while leading product decisions.
Conducted user research to inform design strategy, translating insights into high-quality design solutions.
Defined requirements for frontend teams, collaborated on system design and development, and led product demonstrations for clients.
Managed design deliverables for B2C and B2B platforms in sectors like e-commerce, telemedicine, freelancing, and education.
Involved in software testing and documentation (requirement analysis, design documentation, user guides, etc.)
contributions: Founding designer; led UI/UX of 8 apps in e-commerce, health, edtech, communication, retail & freelancing industries.
Collaborated on system and database design, defined frontend requirements, supported QA, and delivered client demos.

responsibilities: Designed UI/UX for software products, iterating based on client feedback and user research.
Managed design decisions from system wireframes to final interface designs for various applications.
Contributed to system design and collaborated on data models for client projects.

activities: Served as Class Representative for four years
Lead management and volunteered in multiple departmental events
Served as Executive Member leading up to the Vice President of the CSEDU Student Club
Volunteered as an Executive member at DU Science Society (DUSS) and DU IT Society (DUITS)
Councilor at Dhaka City College Student Council
Volunteered in organizing college events as a council member

values.title: Making EULA Great Again: A Novel Nudge Mechanism to Improve Readability, User Attention and Awareness
values.authors: Shamim Bin Zahid, Aishwarya Ghosh Bristy, Mushfiqur Hasan Oli, Md Fahim, Sarker T Ahmed Rumee, Moinul Islam Zaber
values.conference: 20th International Conference on Information Systems Security

values.title: Safeguarding User Privacy through Effective Information Disclosure Summary from the Software End-User License Agreements (EULAs)
values.authors: Shamim Bin Zahid, Aishwarya Ghosh Bristy, Sarker T Ahmed Rumee, Moinul Islam Zaber
values.conference: 6th International Conference on Imaging, Vision & Pattern Recognition (IVPR) & the 11th International Conference on Informatics, Electronics & Vision (ICIEV)

values.title: EULA Usability Project
values.authors: Shamim Bin Zahid, Aishwarya Ghosh Bristy
values.conference: Undergraduate Thesis at University of Dhaka
values.abstract: A user research study investigating the usability of current privacy policy representations and how summarizing impacts on users' awareness of their online information privacy. Followed by development of a tool that summarizes the privacy policies for them.

values.title: Intra Department Programming Contest 2019: 14th out of 137 participants in DU
Second Runners Up in Higher Secondary Category

crafts.label: My Crafts
crafts.description: Helping businesses craft their digital experience and online presence

values.name: Airwork AI
values.summary: Redesigned and migrated the company website to Framer, improving general and programmatic SEO and blog CMS management. Designed over 17 pages with 8+ dynamic code components in under 2 months.

values.name: Robi & Airtel
values.summary: Freelance engagement via an agency, bringing 'My Robi' and 'My Airtel' app functionalities into a seamless web experience for both guests and logged-in users. With a 5-person design team, I was tasked to cover navigation, auth, recharge, prepaid offers, MNP, and live chat.

values.name: ProHR
values.summary: A hiring management platform featuring automated video screening, quizzes, assessments, and structured interviews — streamlining end-to-end recruitment workflows for HR teams and simplifying candidate evaluation at scale.

values.name: Supplers
values.summary: End-to-end design and product management for a global B2B networking platform for the furniture and interior design industry — connecting manufacturers, suppliers, and partners worldwide across a ~2-year engagement.

values.name: HealthOS
values.summary: One of Bangladesh's largest B2B medicine distribution platforms, with integrated e-commerce, delivery logistics, and inventory management systems — designed to support high-volume pharmaceutical supply chains.

values.name: ExamBatch
values.summary: A web app for students and teachers to create, take, and evaluate exams via a dynamic question bank. Focused on personalization, custom tests, and real-time results feedback. Designed from scratch with the founder and tech lead, iterated through user feedback and testing.

values.name: 1Class
values.summary: A live, short-form video class platform delivering bite-sized academic sessions tailored for the Bangladeshi education context. The interface was optimized for video delivery, class scheduling, and fast interactions across devices.

values.name: PreciseMentorship
values.summary: A scalable edtech platform for competitive university entrance exam prep in Bangladesh. Delivered a design system and component library optimized for high-traffic usage, course access, video playback, and progress tracking.

values.name: Genweb2
values.summary: Corporate website for a Bangladeshi software development firm, designed to highlight services, case studies, and client onboarding — using structured visual storytelling to communicate development credibility and build trust.

values.name: Somadha
values.summary: A localized freelance marketplace for the Bangladeshi market with custom pricing, skill-based filtering, and quick service onboarding for both clients and freelancers. Redesigned the entire platform from scratch and built a design system for the dev team.

values.name: Pharmik
values.summary: A B2B SaaS dashboard for pharmaceutical suppliers and retailers in Bangladesh, unifying inventory, sales, staff, and ledger management into a single interface to improve operational efficiency.

values.name: BeeBox
values.summary: An experimental SaaS logistics platform aimed at unifying buyers, sellers, and couriers in a single delivery cycle. Focused on real-time tracking, stakeholder coordination, and UX — ran briefly before being shelved.

values.name: One CM - Digital Signage
values.summary: An Android TV-based digital signage system for retail stores with a centralized admin panel for remote content and schedule management. Designed the TV app and admin panel, and contributed to Android development.

values.name: Latitude23
values.summary: Landing page for a digital branding and strategy agency, built around strong brand identity, modern visual hierarchy, and responsive layout — representing the agency's creative positioning.

values.name: quicc-note
values.summary: A simple multi-page notepad. Content is stored in your local storage. Functionality is intentionally kept simple.

values.name: ytmusic-to-drive
values.summary: Download your favorite YouTube playlist(s) to your Google Drive as highest available quality audio files.

values.name: quicc-draw
values.summary: Doodle on an HTML Canvas. Customizations include Stroke Color, Width, Eraser, Object remove, Undo, Redo, PNG export.

values.name: rexume
values.summary: A modern, customizable resume website built with Next.js that you can configure entirely through a JSON file. Perfect for showcasing your work esp if you're into research or backend dev and need a quick UI for a personal site.

values.name: cf-this-week
values.summary: Forked from rahathossain690/CFThisWeek. A Google Chrome Extension that notifies when there's a CodeForces Contest. Did frontend work.

values.name: gorib-er-airdrop
values.summary: Gorib er Airdrop. Just run the python file and share files locally.

values.name: guchaw
values.summary: A python script to arrange files of a directory into categorized sub-folders according the file types.

values.name: arduino-capacitive-piano
values.summary: Source code & Diagrams of a smoll Arduino project for a lab course (CSE-3113).

values.name: diction
values.summary: A simple Bangla to English Dictionary application implementing perfect hashing. Done as an assignment for Algo-II Course at DU.
